untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific indicators not in allowed list: (1) 'call_volatility_spread' and 'put_volatility_spread' - measure IV differential between calls/puts, (2) 'volatility_spread_percentile' - requires cross-sectional universe ranking, (3) 'volatility_spread_change_week_over_week' - option vol change metric, (4) 'option_liquidity' and 'bid_ask_spread' - derivatives market microstructure. The allowed indicator set contains only equity price/volume and technical indicators (RSI, MACD, ATR, etc.). Options volatility spreads are fundamentally different from price volatility (hvol_20) and cannot be derived from equity price data alone.
translation_notes: This is a volatility smile/skew arbitrage signal requiring real-time options market data. The signal identifies mispricings between call and put IV across a stock universe and requires percentile ranking within that universe. Cannot be implemented with equity price/volume indicators only. Would require integration of options data feeds.
